rationale.ai-review: Independent Apollo agents judge milestones and issue evidence-backed pass/fail verdicts.
rationale.rules-based-checks: Verification teams run tests and CI metrics against executable acceptance criteria.
rationale.remediation-gating: Failed verdicts trigger bounded autonomous fixes with halved budgets and termination.
rationale.hitl-workflow: Dashboard provides pause, resume, and emergency bootstrap controls over autonomous execution.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Dashboard streams reasoning, tool calls, edits, status, costs, and archived reports.
rationale.provenance-auditability: Persistent histories, issue records, and archived reports support human auditability.
